name: Moussaka
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Lean ground beef or lamb
1 and 3/4 cups Tomatoes, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 1 tablespoon butter in a large skillet. Sauté onion until soft.
2. Add beef (1/2 pound at a time) and cook until browned.
3. Add tomatoes, parsley, and tomato paste. Cook for 10 to 15 minutes.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Set aside.
5. Heat oil in a large frying pan. Flour eggplant lightly.
6. Sauté eggplant on both sides in hot oil until golden.
7. Fry potatoes in the same skillet, using additional oil if necessary. Set aside.
8. Melt 1 cup butter in a medium saucepan. Gradually add flour, stirring to form a smooth paste.
9. Gradually add hot milk, stirring over low heat until thick and smooth.
10. Mix in eggs and cheese; cook for 1 minute.
11. Season with nutmeg, salt, and pepper to taste.
12. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
13. In a 2-quart baking dish, arrange the layers alternately: potatoes, meat sauce, eggplant, meat sauce, remaining eggplant.
14. Pour cheese sauce over top.
15. Bake until golden, about 50 to 60 minutes.
